creator: Julie Bort
title: (No AI) Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
dc:creator: Julie Bort
content: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.
contentSnippet: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

creator: Ivan Mehta
title: (No AI) Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
dc:creator: Ivan Mehta
content: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.
contentSnippet: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.

title: (No AI) Silicon Valley has forgotten what normal people want
author: Elizabeth Lopatto
content:
![A brain is shown, melting in the sun](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/268457_HUBRIS_CVIRGINIA.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

The long-term risks of the All-In Podcast, illustrated. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Turbosquid, Getty Images

One of the most mortifying things about knowing a lot of techies is listening to them tell me excitedly about some very important discovery that they believe they have made. Recently, I ran into an acquaintance of mine, who began talking my ear off about an amazing discovery he'd made with LLMs. Knowledge, it turns out, is structured into language! You could put one word into ChatGPT and it might understand what you wanted, or make up a word and see if it understood what you meant! These amazing new tools have revealed that the English corpus contains so _much_ about its speakers!

He concluded that LLMs are a discovery on par with writing.

…

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tldr/915176/nft-metaverse-ai-weirdos)
contentSnippet:
The long-term risks of the All-In Podcast, illustrated. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Turbosquid, Getty Images	

One of the most mortifying things about knowing a lot of techies is listening to them tell me excitedly about some very important discovery that they believe they have made. Recently, I ran into an acquaintance of mine, who began talking my ear off about an amazing discovery he'd made with LLMs. Knowledge, it turns out, is structured into language! You could put one word into ChatGPT and it might understand what you wanted, or make up a word and see if it understood what you meant! These amazing new tools have revealed that the English corpus contains so much about its speakers!
He concluded that LLMs are a discovery on par with writing.

title: (No AI) Fortnite developers can make AI characters now — just don’t try to date them
author: Jay Peters
content:
![An image of Fortnite characters.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/fortnite-anti-cheat-update.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Following last year's [AI-powered Darth Vader in _Fortnite_](https://www.theverge.com/news/668349/fortnite-star-wars-james-earl-jones-vader-ai-voice) that swore in a re-creation of James Earl Jones' voice, Epic Games is now letting _Fortnite_ creators experiment with [a new "conversations" tool](https://www.fortnite.com/news/bring-npcs-to-life-with-ai-powered-conversations) to create AI-powered characters that players can talk and interact with.

"Instead of authoring dialogue trees for characters in your islands, conversations transforms an NPC into an AI-powered character capable of unscripted dialogue and interactions with players, like a quest giver or narrator," Epic says. "You define who the character is with simple prompts-how they think, what they know, and how they behave-and then select a voice that match …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/games/914963/fortnite-ai-characters-developers-conversations)

"You define who the character is with simple prompts-how they think, what they know, and how they behave-and then select a voice that match …

title: (No AI) OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
content: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.
contentSnippet: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.

title: (No AI) Codex for (almost) everything
content: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
contentSnippet: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.

title: (No AI) Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
content: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.
contentSnippet: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

title: (No AI) Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6: Powering real-world robotics tasks through enhanced embodied reasoning
content: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhancing spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding for autonomous robotics.
contentSnippet: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhancing spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding for autonomous robotics.

creator: Javier Carbajal
title: (No AI) A Humanoid Robot Set a Half-Marathon Record in China
dc:creator: Javier Carbajal
content: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.
contentSnippet: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.

creator: Boone Ashworth
title: (No AI) Prego Has a Dinner-Conversation-Recording Device, Capisce?
dc:creator: Boone Ashworth
content: The pasta-sauce company has partnered with the nonprofit StoryCorps on a device designed to record family conversations around the table and save them for all time.
contentSnippet: The pasta-sauce company has partnered with the nonprofit StoryCorps on a device designed to record family conversations around the table and save them for all time.
